targets.query: from(bucket: "vpc_stream") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vpc_logs") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1s, fn: count)
from(bucket: "vpc_stream") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "anomaly_events") |> group(columns: ["type"]) |> count()

from(bucket: "vpc_stream") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vpc_logs") |> group(columns: ["srcaddr"]) |> count() |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 10)
